title: codereview: CCP-1 scope ambiguous on TDMA scheduling authority (centralized vs distributed)
description: Spec does not specify if border router or elected master controls slot allocation. HUMAN: needs decision on whether to use CoAP config resource or RPL extension for schedule dissemination.
notes: HUMAN: decision on TDMA authority (CoAP config or RPL extension)?
close_reason: HUMAN decision on TDMA scheduling authority deferred to spec editors; scope defined via children. Epic ready for next phase.
